mapper.select: SELECT id ,pool_id ,begin_date ,end_date ,description ,is_deleted ,crte_time ,updt_time FROM ip_pool_open_day WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

WITH RECURSIVE pool_tree AS ( SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_name ,open_day_adjust ,CAST(pool_name AS CHAR(2000)) AS pool_full_name FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND parent_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT child.id ,child.parent_id ,child.pool_name ,child.open_day_adjust ,CONCAT(parent.pool_full_name, '/', child.pool_name) AS pool_full_name FROM ip_investment_pool child INNER JOIN pool_tree parent ON parent.id = child.parent_id WHERE child.is_deleted = 0 ) SELECT d.id ,d.pool_id ,p.pool_name ,p.pool_full_name ,p.open_day_adjust ,d.begin_date ,d.end_date ,d.description ,d.crte_time ,d.updt_time FROM ip_pool_open_day d LEFT JOIN pool_tree p ON p.id = d.pool_id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.is_deleted = 0
SELECT id ,parent_id ,pool_code ,pool_name ,open_day_adjust FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ip_investment_pool WHERE parent_id = #{poolId} AND is_deleted = 0
